title: Quiet v2.0 branch
body: Running the full suite of tests is no longer needed on this branch according to @mheon.  Disable extensive testing and notifications, leaving just the bare-bones.  In case this is a mistake, the The Cirrus-Cron job will remain enabled, in order to keep the VM images from getting purged.  As long as the images are available, testing may be re-enabled if needed.

comments.body:
@cevich: PR needs rebase.

<details>

Ooof, I think this might need to be manually merged b/c the silly RDO failure.
It passed all the required tasks. I pushed the button. Branch protection changes were not required.
